hero.subtitle: DENTAL PLANS
hero.title: Affordable Dental Care for Your Family
hero.description: Choose from our range of dental plans designed to provide comprehensive care at affordable prices. No hidden fees, just transparent pricing for quality dental care.

plans.name: Family Care
plans.description: Complete care for the whole family

plans.name: Premium Care
plans.description: Advanced dental care with cosmetic options

faqs.question: Are there any additional fees?
faqs.answer: No, our plans are transparent with no hidden fees. Any treatment not covered by your plan will be clearly explained with costs before proceeding.

faqs.question: Do you accept dental insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we accept most major dental insurance plans. Our team will help you maximize your benefits and minimize out-of-pocket expenses.

faqs.question: Can I change my plan later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, cash, checks, and offer flexible payment plans through CareCredit for larger treatments.

cta.title: Have Questions About Our Dental Plans?
cta.description: Our friendly team is here to help you find the perfect dental plan for you and your family.
